features: TheBodyShop Glowing Cherry Blossom (Japanese Cherry Blossom) fragrance Mist 100 ml
description: Express your joy and spark a little happiness with a few spritzes of our Glowing Cherry Blossom Body Mist, part of the Choice Fragrance Collection. Mist generously whenever you need a refill. We know you'll love the new look of our best-selling Japanese Cherry Blossom range. And don't worry, it still smells the same great. Made with 96% naturally derived ingredients, this light, vegan fragrance lets your personality sing with soft, joyful, floral notes of Japanese Cherry Blossom, Osmanthus Blossom and Sandalwood. The bottle is also made from 42% recycled glass and topped with an aluminum lid. Recycle both to show your planet some love.* *Where local facilities allow. Spritz body spray on the go Floral and fruity scent Notes of Japanese cherry blossom, osmanthus flower and sandalwood 96% naturally derived ingredients Certified by The Vegan Society View full ingredient list 1. Spritz that body spray where and when you want it's your fragrance, so do it your way. Just be careful to avoid your face and eyes though! 2. If you love the scent, lather and moisturise first with our Glowing Cherry Blossom Shower Gel and Glowing Cherry Blossom Body Cream. 3. You can also layer it with our Glowing Cherry Blossom Eau de Toilette.
